product_overview: MCPForge converts OpenAPI specifications into production-ready MCP server projects through a web UI. Users register, upload or fetch specs, map endpoints to MCP primitives, configure server settings, preview generated code, and download project zips.
core_goals: Allow developers to convert OpenAPI specs to MCP servers without CLI tools
Provide visual control over endpoint-to-MCP-type mapping
Generate production-ready, downloadable MCP server projects
Save and manage multiple conversion projects per user with versioned snapshots

features.name: User Registration API
features.description: Create a new user account with email/password, validate inputs, and return user record. Frontend uses this to sign up new users and then create a session.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signup with { email, password, name? } valid body -> Receive 201 with { user: { id, email, name } } -> POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie and JWT (authenticated session)
POST /api/auth/signup with missing or invalid password -> Receive 400 with { errors: { password?: string } }
POST /api/auth/signup with email already registered -> Receive 409 with { errors: { email: 'An account with this email already exists' } }

features.name: Projects List API
features.description: Return the list of projects owned by the authenticated user, ordered by most recently updated.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> GET /api/projects with session cookie -> Receive 200 with { projects: [{ id, name, specTitle, pathCount, createdAt, updatedAt }] }
GET /api/projects without authentication -> Receive 401 with { error: 'Unauthorized' }

POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> GET /api/projects with session cookie when DB error occurs -> Receive 500 with { error: 'Internal server error' }

features.name: Project Creation API
features.description: Create a new project by submitting a project name and OpenAPI spec content; server validates and parses the spec, then creates project, mappings, and default config in a transaction.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> POST /api/projects with { name, specContent, specFormat? } valid body -> Receive 201 with { project: { id, name, pathCount } }
POST /api/projects with missing name (authenticated) -> Receive 400 with { error: 'Project name is required' }
POST /api/projects with invalid OpenAPI content (authenticated) -> Receive 400 with { error: 'Invalid specification details' }
POST /api/projects without authentication -> Receive 401 with { error: 'Unauthorized' }

features.name: Project Detail API
features.description: Retrieve, update (name), or delete a specific project. All operations enforce ownership and return appropriate errors for missing/forbidden resources.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> GET /api/projects/:id with session cookie (owner) -> Receive 200 with { project: { id, name, specContent, mappings, config } }

POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> PATCH /api/projects/:id with { name } valid body (owner) -> Receive 200 with { project: { id, name, updatedAt } }
POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> DELETE /api/projects/:id (owner) -> Receive 200 with { message: 'Project deleted' }
GET /api/projects/:id when project does not exist -> Receive 404 with { error: 'Project not found' }
GET /api/projects/:id when user is not owner -> Receive 403 with { error: 'Forbidden' }
PATCH /api/projects/:id with invalid name (e.g., empty) -> Receive 400 with { error: 'validation error message' }

features.name: Endpoint Mappings API
features.description: List endpoint mappings for a project with optional search, method, MCP type filters and pagination.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> GET /api/projects/:id/mappings?page=1&limit=20&search=pets&method=GET&mcpType=resource with session cookie -> Receive 200 with { mappings: [...], total, page, totalPages, toolCount, resourceCount, templateCount, excludeCount }
GET /api/projects/:id/mappings without authentication -> Receive 401 with { error: 'Unauthorized' }
POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> GET /api/projects/:id/mappings for a project owned by another user -> Receive 403 with { error: 'Forbidden' }
GET /api/projects/:id/mappings when project id not found -> Receive 404 with { error: 'Project not found' }

features.name: Single Mapping Update API
features.description: Update the MCP type of a single mapping; validates allowed types and rejects no-op updates.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> PATCH /api/projects/:id/mappings/:mappingId with { mcpType: 'resource' } valid change -> Receive 200 with { mapping: { id, method, path, mcpType, ... } }
PATCH /api/projects/:id/mappings/:mappingId with invalid mcpType -> Receive 400 with { error: 'Invalid MCP type' }
PATCH /api/projects/:id/mappings/:mappingId with mcpType equal to current value -> Receive 400 with { error: 'MCP type is already set to this value' }
PATCH /api/projects/:id/mappings/:mappingId for mapping that does not exist -> Receive 404 with { error: 'Mapping not found' }

features.name: Bulk Mapping Update API
features.description: Update MCP type for multiple mappings in a single request. Validates selection and type.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> PATCH /api/projects/:id/mappings/bulk with { mappingIds: ['m1','m2'], mcpType: 'tool' } -> Receive 200 with { updated: 2 }
PATCH /api/projects/:id/mappings/bulk with empty mappingIds -> Receive 400 with { error: 'No mappings selected' }
PATCH /api/projects/:id/mappings/bulk with invalid mcpType -> Receive 400 with { error: 'Invalid MCP type' }
PATCH /api/projects/:id/mappings/bulk for project not owned by user -> Receive 403 with { error: 'Forbidden' }

features.name: Server Config API
features.description: Get and update server configuration for a project. Validates transport, authMethod, serverName, semver serverVersion, baseUrl, and port range.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> GET /api/projects/:id/config with session cookie -> Receive 200 with { config: { transport, authMethod, serverName, serverVersion, baseUrl, port } }

POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> PUT /api/projects/:id/config with valid body { transport: 'sse', authMethod: 'none', serverName: 'petstore', serverVersion: '1.2.3', baseUrl: 'https://api.example.com', port: 4000 } -> Receive 200 with updated { config: {...} }
PUT /api/projects/:id/config with port outside 1024-65535 -> Receive 400 with { error: 'Validation failed', fieldErrors: { port: ['Must be between 1024 and 65535'] } }
GET /api/projects/:id/config without authentication -> Receive 401 with { error: 'Unauthorized' }
PUT /api/projects/:id/config for a project not owned by user -> Receive 403 with { error: 'Access denied' }

features.name: Code Generation and Download API
features.description: Generate MCP server code from mappings and config, create a version snapshot, and provide a downloadable zip.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> POST /api/projects/:id/generate with session cookie -> Receive 200 with { version: { id, versionNumber, createdAt }, files: { 'src/index.ts': '...', 'package.json': '...', ... } }
POST /api/projects/:id/generate without authentication -> Receive 401 with { error: 'Unauthorized' }

POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> GET /api/projects/:id/download with session cookie -> Receive 200 with binary zip (Content-Type: application/zip)
GET /api/projects/:id/download for non-existent project -> Receive 404 with { error: 'Project not found' }
POST /api/projects/:id/generate when server encounters unexpected error -> Receive 500 with { error: 'Internal server error' }

features.name: Version History API
features.description: List version snapshots for a project ordered most recent first; used to view past generated code/configurations.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie -> GET /api/projects/:id/versions with session cookie -> Receive 200 with { versions: [{ id, versionNumber, configSnapshot, createdAt }] }
GET /api/projects/:id/versions without authentication -> Receive 401 with { error: 'Unauthorized' }
GET /api/projects/:id/versions for project not owned by user -> Receive 403 with { error: 'Access denied' }
GET /api/projects/:id/versions for non-existent project -> Receive 404 with { error: 'Project not found' }

tech_stack: NextAuth v5 with Credentials provider and JWT sessions

features.name: User Registration API
features.description: Register new users with email, password, and optional name. Validates input, checks for duplicate emails, hashes passwords with bcrypt.

response_schema.409: { errors: { email: 'An account with this email already exists' } }

features.name: Projects List API
features.description: List all projects for the authenticated user, ordered by most recently updated.

endpoints.description: List all projects for the authenticated user

response_schema.200: { projects: [{ id, name, specTitle, pathCount, createdAt, updatedAt }] }

features.name: Project Creation API
features.description: Create a new project by parsing an OpenAPI spec. Creates the project, endpoint mappings, and default server config in a transaction.

endpoints.description: Create a new project from an OpenAPI specification

body.name: string (required, 1-100 chars)
body.specContent: string (required, valid OpenAPI JSON or YAML)

response_schema.400: { error: 'Project name is required' } or { error: 'Spec content is required' } or { error: 'Invalid specification details' }

features.name: Project Detail API
features.description: Get, update, or delete a specific project. Enforces ownership - returns 403 if the project belongs to another user.

endpoints.description: Get a project with its mappings and config

response_schema.200: { project: { id, name, specContent, mappings: [...], config: {...} } }

endpoints.description: Delete a project and all related data

features.name: Endpoint Mappings API
features.description: List endpoint mappings with filtering and pagination. Supports search by path or operationId, filter by HTTP method or MCP type.

endpoints.description: List endpoint mappings with optional filters and pagination

query.search: string (optional, search by path or operationId)
query.method: string (optional, filter by HTTP method like GET POST PUT DELETE)
query.mcpType: string (optional, filter by tool resource resource_template exclude)

response_schema.200: { mappings: [...], total, page, totalPages, toolCount, resourceCount, templateCount, excludeCount }

features.name: Single Mapping Update API
features.description: Update the MCP type of a single endpoint mapping. Returns 400 if the type is unchanged or invalid.

endpoints.description: Update MCP type for a single endpoint mapping

body.mcpType: string (required, one of tool resource resource_template exclude)

response_schema.400: { error: 'Invalid MCP type' } or { error: 'MCP type is already set to this value' }
response_schema.404: { error: 'Project not found' } or { error: 'Mapping not found' }

features.name: Bulk Mapping Update API
features.description: Update MCP type for multiple endpoint mappings at once.

endpoints.description: Bulk update MCP type for selected endpoint mappings

body.mcpType: string (required, one of tool resource resource_template exclude)

response_schema.400: { error: 'No mappings selected' } or { error: 'Invalid MCP type' }

features.name: Server Config API
features.description: Get and update server configuration for a project. Validates port range 1024-65535, semver format for version, and transport type.

endpoints.description: Get server configuration for a project

response_schema.200: { config: { transport, authMethod, serverName, serverVersion, baseUrl, port } }
response_schema.404: { error: 'Project not found' } or { error: 'Config not found' }

body.transport: string (required, one of stdio sse streamable-http)
body.authMethod: string (required, one of none api-key bearer basic)

response_schema.200: { config: { transport, authMethod, serverName, serverVersion, baseUrl, port } }

features.name: Code Generation and Download API
features.description: Generate MCP server files from project mappings and config. Creates a version snapshot. Download as zip.

endpoints.description: Generate MCP server code and create a version snapshot
Download generated project as a zip file

response_schema.200: Binary zip file with Content-Type application/zip

features.name: Version History API
features.description: List all version snapshots for a project, ordered by most recent first.

endpoints.description: List version history for a project

known_limitations.issue: Fetch spec proxy has no authentication and could be used for SSRF
known_limitations.impact: Unauthenticated users can make the server fetch arbitrary URLs

known_limitations.issue: No rate limiting on any API endpoints
known_limitations.impact: Vulnerable to brute force and denial of service
